picks.rationale: SNDK has surged +693.24% YTD with exceptional fundamentals: $5.95B revenue up 97% QoQ, 78.4% gross margins, and forward P/E of just 10.9x, while data center revenue surged 233% QoQ. [247wallst.com](https://247wallst.com/investing/2026/06/18/wall-street-just-put-a-monster-target-on-micron-is-the-stock-still-too-cheap-2/) confirms Apple's CEO warned of memory-driven price hikes, and [seekingalpha.com](https://seekingalpha.com/article/4915912-sandisks-rally-may-be-far-from-over) highlights multi-year agreements securing over 1/3 of FY2027 output with $11B+ guarantees.

MU has risen +262% YTD with a strong_buy analyst consensus (an_score 1.48) and positive news sentiment of 0.273. Web search confirms multiple analyst target hikes to $1,500 from Deutsche Bank, Stifel, and TD Cowen, with forward P/E of just 9x and fiscal Q3 earnings expected on June 24. [247wallst.com](https://247wallst.com/investing/2026/06/18/wall-street-just-put-a-monster-target-on-micron-is-the-stock-still-too-cheap-2/)

WDC has surged +301.34% YTD with strong news sentiment (0.194). Web search shows Morgan Stanley raised price target to $650 citing AI-driven HDD demand and a 10-15% supply-demand gap in 2026, with the stock gaining 16% in a single day on the U.S.-Iran peace deal. [tradingview.com](https://www.tradingview.com/news/stocktwits:4631c7c67094b:0-why-wdc-mu-stx-sndk-stocks-rallied-hard-today-and-lifted-dram-to-solid-breakout/)

STX has gained +272.27% YTD with strong news sentiment (0.114) and a buy analyst consensus. Web search confirms Morgan Stanley raised price target to $1,035, citing HDD supply shortages driven by cloud and AI storage buildouts, with the stock surging 9.4% on the U.S.-Iran peace deal. [invezz.com](https://invezz.com/in/news/2026/06/18/mu-sndk-stx-wdc-stocks-rise-after-apple-chief-warns-of-memory-driven-price-hikes/)

CRDO has gained +85.35% YTD and +69.88% in the past month, with a strong_buy analyst consensus (an_score 1.33) and positive news sentiment (0.225). The company reported record FY26 results with triple-digit revenue growth, reflecting strong AI connectivity demand.

MRVL has surged +267.70% YTD and an extraordinary +94.33% in the past month, with a strong_buy analyst consensus (an_score 1.45). Despite negative news sentiment (-0.204), the strong momentum and analyst support highlight AI-driven custom silicon and data infrastructure demand.

DELL has gained +227.18% YTD and +74.36% in the past month, with strong news sentiment (0.33) and a buy analyst consensus. The stock benefits from AI server demand and enterprise refresh cycles, though short interest of 6.28% suggests some caution.

WULF has gained +126.26% YTD with a strong_buy analyst consensus (an_score 1.33) and positive news sentiment (0.15). The company is a pure-play AI data center operator benefiting from the AI compute buildout, despite high short interest of 25.85% which adds risk.

TLN has gained +9.07% YTD and +33.47% in the past month with strong news sentiment (0.217). Web search confirms Goldman Sachs initiated at buy, citing PJM power tightness boosting earnings, with the stock up 25.50% in the past week. [247wallst.com](https://247wallst.com/investing/2026/06/18/wall-street-just-put-a-monster-target-on-micron-is-the-stock-still-too-cheap-2/) mentions AI power demand catalysts.

285A has gained a massive +753.74% YTD and +88.34% in the past month with positive news sentiment (0.164). The stock tracks Japanese memory chip exposure and benefits from the broader memory upcycle, though a high P/E of 95.61 warrants caution.
